style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls from Alakazam's metallic joints as glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting sharp reflections of the distorted environment across its polished surface. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the cold blue-white light that emanates from its core, creating an eerie, precise aura of crystalline intensity. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
